message:
Thread extension_id through FsConnector for per-extension policy, revert broad sandbox allowlist

FsConnector.handle_host_call() and handle_fs_params() now accept an
optional extension_id parameter, enabling per-extension policy
evaluation via policy.evaluate_for(capability, extension_id). The WASM
host dispatch_fs() call site passes self.extension_id.as_deref(). All
test call sites updated to pass None (existing behavior preserved).

Revert the broad sandbox path allowlist expansion from the prior commit
that allowed temp_dir, ~/.pi, and ~/.wakatime for all extensions. The
per-extension policy mechanism is the correct approach — extensions that
need access to specific paths should declare capabilities that the
policy system can evaluate on a per-extension basis, rather than
blanket-allowing sensitive directories for all extensions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
